reasoning: As of November 2025, OpenAI's CEO Sam Altman is predicting AGI could emerge 'as early as 2029'. They are currently only at Level 2 (Reasoners) of their 5-level path to AGI and hope to reach Level 3 (Agents) in early 2026. Given the short time remaining in 2025 (only ~7 weeks), reports of scaling walls, and the strict Microsoft partnership clauses surrounding an AGI declaration, an official announcement of achieving AGI before the end of 2025 is exceedingly unlikely.
